name: Cornel West
description: American philosopher, political activist and writer (born 1953)
abstract: Cornel Ronald West (born June 2, 1953) is an American philosopher, theologian, Black activist, democratic socialist, and public intellectual. West was an independent candidate in the 2024 United States presidential election and is an outspoken voice in left-wing politics in the United States.

about_quotes.speaker: Arturo O'Farrill
about_quotes.evidence: I did a recording with Cornel West that won a Grammy called “Four Questions.” And I wrote a concerto basically for Cornel West’s oratory.
about_quotes.doc_title: Arturo O'Farrill interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, May 6, 2024
